'''Dinua Jeban''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] commando who fought in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was one of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] supercommandos from the outbreak of the invasion, although she was only fourteen at the time.

Her father had [[Death/Legends|died]] before the war. Her mother, [[Briika Jeban]], died in the first [[Standard year/Legends|year]]. Shortly thereafter, [[Goran Beviin]] adopted her, as he had earlier agreed.<ref name="A Practical Man" />

After the war, Dinua married a man called [[Jintar]], and they had two children, a son named [[Shalk]] and a daughter named [[Briila]]; as they were about seven and five respectively in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], they must have been born in approximately [[33 ABY/Legends|33 ABY]] and [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]].

Although she had been at war for five years in the conflict with the Yuuzhan Vong, Dinua stayed with her adopted father to raise the children during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], when Jintar took mercenary work. Their children were too young for both of their parents to go off to war.<ref name="Sacrifice" />
